Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JESSE JONG of Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices, LLP, Tel No. (415) 626-7744 appearing for Petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER TOUR-SARKISSIAN LAW OFFICES, LLP'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
